title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 492.320 - Residence of witness certified by officer
text:
492.320.  Residence of witness certified by officer. — When the officer taking depositions in virtue of this law shall, in his certificate, state the place of residence of the witness, such statement shall be prima facie evidence of the facts.
(RSMo 1939 § 1945) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1781; 1919 § 5468; 1909 § 6412
